element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Critical to player success; used for combat, swinging/grappling, grabbing and throwing objects
Themed level environments introduce varied spatial challenges

element_introduction_order.element: Power-ups (Bomb, Twin Balls, Hammer Punch, Jet Sneakers)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Purchased with cash; optional player choice to customize loadout
Mugsy and themed bosses; require punch gun mastery

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Later levels (unused flying variant suggests progression)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Hangs upside down, throws mini-bats; testing flying mechanics suggests escalating complexity
Unlocked progression gate; culminating challenge against Mugsy
Stripped of power-ups and money; 3 lives only; no health replenishment between levels; demands complete punch gun mastery

typical_relief_triggers: Bonus minigame channel (Roulette, Pipe Toss, Basketball) for cash and lives
Completion of each selectable channel (checkpoint/password system)
typical_tension_triggers: Boss encounters at end of channels
Themed environmental hazards (carnival, plane, park obstacles)
Enemy encounters requiring punch gun timing
Secret stage with no health recovery between levels
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Player-paced with gating: four freely-selectable channels build toward mandatory final boss stage; secret stage represents extreme difficulty spike requiring full mechanic mastery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Shopping Channel and Bonus Channel are optional detours for resource gathering; player can choose channel order (Channels 1-4)
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret stage unlocked post-credits; hidden from normal progression flow

difficulty_curve.early_game: Channel 1 introduces punch gun mechanics in safe context; basic enemy patterns establish core skill foundation
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Channels 2-4 introduce themed environmental variety (carnival, plane, park) with moderate complexity; player-selected order allows skill-paced progression; shopping allows optional power-up scaling
difficulty_curve.late_game: Channel 5 (final boss stage) consolidates punch gun mastery requirements; secret stage strips all power-ups and imposes 3-life hard cap with no health replenishment, demanding complete mechanical proficiency
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at end of each channel require significant punch gun accuracy and timing
Secret stage represents extreme difficulty spike: no power-ups, no money, no health recovery between levels, severe life limit

notable_level_patterns.description: Channels 2-4 feature distinct visual and hazard themes (carnival, moving plane, park) that introduce spatial variety while maintaining core punch gun combat
Shopping Channel and Bonus Channel exist outside main progression; allow players to acquire cash and power-ups between mandatory channels via minigames
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Bonus Channel (Roulette, Pipe Toss, Basketball minigames)

notable_level_patterns.description: Channels 1-4 can be played in any order before mandatory final stage unlock; player choice determines difficulty curve and resource accumulation strategy
Secret stage after credits serves as skill certification: removes all power-ups, money, health recovery, and limits lives to 3; requires pure punch gun mechanics expertise
